indexing.convention: history latents/action blocks at model steps [i, i+1, i+2] target latent at [i+3]
indexing.training_source: le-wm/train.py: tgt_emb = emb[:, num_preds:] with num_preds=1; final predictor token is next latent

contact.caveat: HDF5 has no n_contacts; this uses the prior geometric fallback from 7D state.
